meta.name: description
meta.content: A Companion Web App for the Cthulhu Wars Boardgame

div.p: Necronomicon is a free companion web app for the Cthulhu Wars boardgame. It is developed by Filippo Salvarani as fan project and it's made with resources gathered freely from the Petersen's Games' website and from the Cthulhu Wars boardgame community
The Cthulhu Wars boardgame and all its rules and illustrations belong to Petersen Games.
Special thanks to Cryo Chamber and Darkraven Games for allowing me to include their music in my project.
For feedback, bugs or feature requests you may contact me from my BoardGameGeek's profile page or at dev@necronomicon.app.

While Necronomicon is completely free, developing and mantaining a website requires a lot of time (and quite some money), if you want to say thank you or just to encourage my work, please, consider making a donation.
